features: Discover a world of sensations in your home with ASEVI PRIMAVERA
An exclusive fragrance of great elegance inspired by the harmony and freshness of nature itself
By spraying it in your home or on fabrics it releases delicate and soft notes inspired by the freshness of white flowers and jasmine with a light fruity touch
Its intense fragrance quickly and completely eliminates bad odours, prolonging the feeling of freshness and well-being in your home
Fabric can stay for up to 12 hours
description: Discover a world of sensations in your home with ASEVI PRIMAVERA. A unique fragrance of great elegance inspired by the harmony and freshness of nature itself.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Refresh and deodorize the air in enclosed spaces such as homes, offices or cars.
